title: calliandra emarginata
intro: Calliandra emarginata, also known as the Mexican bird's clay or bird's clay tree, is a species of flowering plant in the legume family, Fabaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is used to treat various health conditions such as wounds, skin infections, and fever. The health benefits of Calliandra emarginata include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which help to promote wound healing and reduce the risk of infection. Herbal preparations of Calliandra emarginata can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are used to treat a range of health issues, including digestive problems and respiratory infections.
